treatment_timeline.event: Treatment with Valproate ended due to lack of success

patient_outcome.final_status: Severe neuropsychological impairment with loss of verbal and gestural language, total withdrawal from the environment, stereotyped rubbing movements of the hands, gait disturbances, impaired chewing and swallowing, dystonic posturing, and a slight pyramidal syndrome
patient_outcome.complications: Prolonged apneas causing labial cyanosis and sometimes loss of consciousness
